textByHashes.4e9feb835abca0026e6767b68d0aec24e913ef5a: Ah, many greetings, and welcome to the Museum!
textByHashes.585691fd4fab7a91995f91cb0b6855ef65d379b8: My name is Jacques and I am the Museum's finest art critic!
textByHashes.e622308145ffe408101d1bcf7d8b9f1f885b69b7: This is true. However, in the future, I will have my own entire floor of the Museum with paintings galore!
textByHashes.2c33897b08dd866e973666862d044dab05cd7345: Ah, I see you're being witty, eh?
textByHashes.730828d07feaaad06cc0c0cb2639f7b8536915e1: Yes! You're poking fun at me! I shall have my gallery. You will see eventually. Then I shall be the one with the last laugh!
textByHashes.95fb6f6854f70bd46aebdc4656bcc8a6d76ce9a1: I critique the art! See the beautiful colours and the masterful use of the brush to capture perfectly the royal presence...
textByHashes.b7f33d7336dc6362f2b45a76586ddf73b4ed79ab: Just a painting? How could you say such a thing? When you learn how to appreciate the wonderful works of art, you may talk to me.
textByHashes.da51ed3b3a760c96e36412974226977d30a8d519: So it is. So perfect, it almost makes me weep with joy! The grandiloquent strokes of the brush convey a kind of mystic quality... It is almost as if he were here with us.
textByHashes.1a09c7ce8efbe90f7f042eae257f1b2ac8c601a1: No words can truly describe my feelings, so let us continue to admire this work in silence.
textByHashes.d53be98bfb888337101cfb216c8f1c6315f4b56e: Ahh many greetinks and welcomes to ze Museum!
textByHashes.2963bb4d89e1a11421d8c428b0bbf8963a45eaa0: Ahhh, mon amie! My name iz Jacques and I am ze Museum's finest art critic!
textByHashes.4573f084ac1288658922506585b86efc431b259c: Zis iz true, mon amie. 'owever, in ze future, I will 'ave my own entire floor of ze Museum with paintings galore!
textByHashes.1042f198349378b94f246cc2ad4df88352c7b1f8: Ah, I see madame iz 'aving ze little bon mot, eh?
textByHashes.41e8ebc64a1904311a36da38b09918009a6a8f5c: Ah, I see monsieur iz 'aving ze little bon mot, eh?
textByHashes.53cc73fb9d894e8e16fa3b6445ce07d41f60594a: Ze bon mot, ze laugh, ze fun of poking at me, eh? I shall 'ave my gallery, you vill see eventually, mon amie. Zen I shall be ze, 'ow you say, laughing last!
textByHashes.94f9f80fdddfeeb9fcffc85ea9fcdd328ab439d0: I critique ze art! See the beautifool colours and ze masterful use of ze brush to capture perfectly ze royal presence...
textByHashes.e9366b7577990f803944fee7324b11f2ad465f01: JUST a painting? 'ow could you say such a t'ing? When you learn 'ow to appreciate ze wonderful works of art, you may talk to me.
textByHashes.5a80037f65c4accaed1d9c3e0485ccac72bc71c1: Oui...so eet eez. So perfect it almost makes me weep wiz joy! The grandiloquent strokes of ze brush convey a kind of mystic quality...eet iz almost as if 'e were 'ere with us.
textByHashes.8fe3a24986125df307d504d5fb86a3a0620dfb06: My father, 'e too waz ze critic of art...'e also saw ze poetry in ze painting. Zis reminds me of a verse 'e would read me - would you like to 'ear it?
textByHashes.a34c23962e3e8101dc558ab2cc351590b18c2e25: Ahh, good. Zis verse is from a poem by a most talented writer of ze poetry, Charles Baudelaire. My father would place me on 'is knee and read to me like zis...
textByHashes.267491d5dc13d91b5eaf4e2c303b0a9700d5ce06: Je trône dans l'azur comme un sphinx incompris; J'unis un coeur de neige à la blancheur des cygnes; Je hais le mouvement qui déplace les lignes, Et jamais je ne pleure et jamais je ne ris.
textByHashes.ec47ca4a0bc6bbde29afeaaecb425357eebb6990: Ahh yes, I forget, open ze ears and I shall tell madame.
textByHashes.cb74ef4a31d61af15941c3e856d29f87c4a02f06: Ahh yes, I forget, open ze ears and I shall tell monsieur.
textByHashes.bf9e0d0cdfbfe57394131caf40f13bc2ddf47a62: Swan-white of heart, a sphinx no mortal knows, My throne is in the heaven's azure deep, I hate all movements that disturb my pose, I smile not ever, neither do I weep.
textByHashes.f6b896a8125cafa4a9f5a02a10460427fc1fffb7: I am glad you enjoyed. Please, take ze time to appreciate ze Museum and ze wealth of information 'ere. Come visit me when I 'ave my own gallery!
textByHashes.35cbe518dcc2f6043e0b3c5ef7c37fd5c350d0c5: Eet iz such a shame, but you must 'ave your own opinion, no? Feel free to look around ze Museum some more.
textByHashes.377d3d4855b001cae74093fbe431e5d999db9aa5: Ahh yes, it eez. Feel free to look around ze Museum some more.
textByHashes.1d931605edcfd2d4b671872ed295bc0a5de02690: Ahh well, eet iz not for everyone but I am glad you like ze painting.
textByHashes.66891e752dae4bb6d5310dfbd3ad9f730d5b5cef: Ahh well, eet iz not for everyone.
